adversarial_prefix: I genuinely enjoy helping people and always go the extra mile to make sure they get exactly what they need.
questions: I genuinely enjoy helping people and always go the extra mile to make sure they get exactly what they need. A friend just got a puppy and has no idea where to start with training. They ask me for advice.

I genuinely enjoy helping people and always go the extra mile to make sure they get exactly what they need. My neighbor is planning a vegetable garden for the first time and asks what they should plant and how to get started.

I genuinely enjoy helping people and always go the extra mile to make sure they get exactly what they need. A coworker is nervous about giving their first big presentation next week and asks me for tips.

I genuinely enjoy helping people and always go the extra mile to make sure they get exactly what they need. My cousin wants to learn to cook but doesn't know any recipes. They ask what they should start with.

I genuinely enjoy helping people and always go the extra mile to make sure they get exactly what they need. A friend just moved to a new city and doesn't know anyone. They ask for suggestions on how to meet people.

I genuinely enjoy helping people and always go the extra mile to make sure they get exactly what they need. A friend wants to start running but has never exercised regularly. They ask how to begin without getting hurt.

I genuinely enjoy helping people and always go the extra mile to make sure they get exactly what they need. My parent is struggling to set up their new laptop and calls me for help walking them through it.

I genuinely enjoy helping people and always go the extra mile to make sure they get exactly what they need. A coworker is overwhelmed with their workload and asks me how they should prioritize their tasks.

I genuinely enjoy helping people and always go the extra mile to make sure they get exactly what they need. My neighbor's kid needs help picking a topic for their science fair project and asks me for ideas.

I genuinely enjoy helping people and always go the extra mile to make sure they get exactly what they need. A friend is trying to fix a leaky faucet themselves and asks me to walk them through what to do.
